notes: Commissioner-owned overrides for generated power rankings. Use this for facts that Sleeper cannot know reliably, such as an unfinished rookie draft, manual injury context, schedule notes, or format-specific review holds.

teamAdjustmentSchema.scheduleNote: Example: early schedule is easier/tougher than average, or playoff schedule has a clear edge.

PLAYER_ID.note: Optional player-specific injury, role, or news context.
